sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100508" key="sunhbole/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνηβολ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n100508.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fall in with, meet</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀλλήλοις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:61:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">61.3</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
